footer.title: About this website
footer.content:
This Website was designed for showing some of my work, knowledge and my resume. 
 This Website was build on React, and using the libraries tsParticles, I18next, React-Bootstrap and PWA. 
 If you are interested on my porfile, do not hesitate on contacting me via email, Linkedin or Whatsapp.
